title: New Misc Items
description: I added news items to minecraft like a computer,phone,ipad,curry,burnt curry, ore of curry, and a curry block
body:
I added news items to minecraft like a computer,phone,ipad,curry,burnt curry, ore of curry, and a curry block. I also added creative mode tab called "custom items".

There are a no new features on this mod, but you want to download it because you get to feel curry in minecraft!

demo:
